MHLW Sample Fixture

This directory contains a very small subset of rows from:
  厚生労働省 医療情報ネットのオープンデータ
  https://www.mhlw.go.jp/stf/seisakunitsuite/bunya/kenkou_iryou/iryou/newpage_43373.html
  License: 公共データ利用規約 (PDL 1.0)

Purpose: test-only fixture for tests/unit/test_normalize_mhlw.py.
Retention: kept minimal (< 60 KB) for offline CI runs.
